title: 48 Pcs Thank You Gifts Plastic Coffee Cups with Lids, 470 ml Reusable Christmas Appreciation Tumblers Bulk, Inspirational Travel Mugs for Employee Teacher Coworker Staff Team Nurse (Colorful)
features: Package Includes: You will get 48 pieces of reusable coffee cups with lids, a total of 12 colors, 4 of each color, sufficient quantity and rich colors to meet your daily use and replacement needs, suitable for use at home, travel, school and office

High-Quality Material: Thank you gifts coffee cups are made of pp plastic, which is safe, reliable, BPA-free and odor-free. Compared with traditional glass cups, these Christmas coffee cups with lids are more durable and not easy to break, providing a safer and more practical choice for daily use
Large Capacity: Our plastic inspirational tumblers bulk has a capacity of 16oz, which is easy to hold and carry, suitable for holding water, coffee, milkshakes, juices, cocktails and other beverages

Inspiring Appearance Design: This employee appreciation travel mug has a warm thank you text designed on the wall of the cup, which brings encouragement and strength to those who use it, suitable for teachers, employees, volunteers, nurses, friends and classmates

Widely Used: Multipack employee coffee cups with lids are ideal gifts for employees, colleagues, teachers and nurses on birthdays, weddings, Thanksgiving, Christmas and graduations to express gratitude and blessings to them
description: Product Description Teacher appreciation gifts tumbler can be widely used in: Gifts for Staff & Employees – Boost workplace morale with motivational tumblers for staff appreciation weeks, company events, and end-of-year celebrations. Teacher & Nurse Gifts – Say thank you to educators, school staff, and healthcare workers with a practical and heartfelt token of appreciation. Party & Event Favors – Great for weddings, birthdays, corporate gatherings, team-building events, and Christmas parties. Travel-Friendly Cups – Ideal for daily commutes, car journeys, gym hydration, road trips, and outdoor adventures. Home & Office Essentials – Use as reusable cups for home, office desks, break rooms, or on-the-go sipping.
